Apache ECharts (echarts.min.js)
===============================

This dashboard vendors Apache ECharts for offline / firewall-friendly usage.

- Project: Apache ECharts
- Version: 5.6.0
- License: Apache License 2.0

Source package:
  echarts@5.6.0 (dist/echarts.min.js)

Full license text:
  https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
